zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Loutham於1417年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓時，她的父親Sir John Loutham26歲，母親Jane Kelvedon22歲。她於1433年與Sir Richard Verney在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Loutham于1417年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓时，她的父亲Sir John Loutham26岁，母亲Jane Kelvedon22岁。她于1433年与Sir Richard Verney在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Loutham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lothian
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the region so named in southeastern central Scotland. The placename is very ancient and is of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Loutham was born in 1417, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John Loutham, was 26 and her mother, Jane Kelvedon, was 22. She married Sir Richard Verney in 1433, in Compton Verney, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1490, in Compton Verney, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Loutham est née en 1417, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Loutham, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Kelvedon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Verney en 1433, à Compton Verney, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Compton Verney, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Louthamが1417年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Louthamは26歳，母Jane Kelvedonは22歳であった。1433年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコンプトン バーニーでSir Richard Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコンプトン バーニーで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Loutham(이)가 1417년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Loutham(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Kelvedon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콤프턴 베른이에서 Sir Richard Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콤프턴 베른이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Loutham nasceu em 1417, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Loutham, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Kelvedon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Verney em 1433, em Compton Verney, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Loutham родилась в 1417 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Loutham было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Kelvedon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Verney в 1433 г. в местности комптон вирни, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности комптон вирни, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Sir Richard Verney en 1433, en Compton Verney, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
